heroHeadline:
Iran Launches 6th Wave at Tel Nof;
IDF Says 'Thousands of Targets' Remain
heroSubtitle: Day 17: Iran's IRGC launches 6th wave targeting Tel Nof AB, Israeli Military HQ, Tel Aviv defense complex. IDF says 3+ more weeks of operations planned; 'thousands of targets' remain. Trump says Iran 'ready to negotiate' but terms insufficient; Araghchi: 'We never asked for a ceasefire.' Arab League condemns Iran's attacks on Arab states. UK/France/Germany joint statement opposes 'regime change from the skies.' USS George H.W. Bush completing certification as potential 3rd carrier. Lebanon: 850+ killed, 2,100+ injured. US KIA: 13. Iran: 1,444+ official (HRANA: 2,800+).
footerNote: Data compiled from 100+ sources across 4 media poles as of March 16, 2026. All contested claims are marked. Multi-pole sourcing active.
